title: Egyptian Breakfast Fritters
description: A spicy Mexican breakfast dish made with Egyptian fritters, oatmeal, and other delicious ingredients.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
Add a small amount of oil to the skillet and sauté the chopped tomatoes until they're tender.
Add the Egyptian fritters to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until they're crispy and golden brown.
In a separate bowl, mix together the oatmeal, Mexican cheese, cilantro, lime juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked fritters to the bowl and toss them with the oatmeal mixture until they're well coated.
Serve the fritters hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
